ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_business_name" TEXT /* Business name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the store */,
  "store_url" TEXT /* URL of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "pro_phone" TEXT /* Professional phone number of the store */,
  "pro_fax" TEXT /* Professional fax number of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  "store_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store format */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_close_date" TEXT /* Date the store closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Current status of the store (e.g., open, closed, under renovation) */,
  "store_area" REAL /* Area of the store in square feet or meters */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the store */,
  "store_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., store manager, sales associate) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's role */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES employee_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the store format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_format_bridge" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., sales, inventory, employee) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the update is for */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., contact information, store hours, store status) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who made the update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_updates_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the visit is for */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date the visit was made */,
  "visit_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the visit report */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of the visit (e.g., customer, employee, inspection) */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_visits_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
